tools.title: Visual Processing Suite
tools.desc: Each tool runs entirely in your browser. No uploads.

pixel.name: Pixel Sorter
pixel.desc: Sort pixels by brightness, hue or saturation.

constellation.name: Constellation
constellation.desc: Overlay generative star maps and node networks.

ascii.name: ASCII Canvas
ascii.desc: Transform images into creative ASCII art.

constellation.fileDrop: Click or drop an image here

ascii.title: ASCII Canvas
ascii.subtitle: Transform images into creative ASCII art
ascii.dragDrop: Drag image here or click to select
ascii.tip: 💡 Adjust parameters and click Generate to see the ASCII art

about.title: How it Works
about.p1: PUDRUS.XYZ is a browser-based creative suite for image and video processing.
about.p2: Built with vanilla JavaScript. No frameworks, no accounts.

footer.note: Built in the browser, for the browser
